sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64314" key="luxnw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λυχν-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n64314.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a lamp</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυρώδης</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
